svg.title: LLM vs AI Agent — structural architecture
svg.desc: Left side shows a bare LLM as a pure function (prompt in, text out). Right side shows an AI Agent wrapping that same LLM with a tool executor, memory store, and control loop.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a bare LLM work internally?')

svg.text: No state. No tools. No loop.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the agent control loop?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM work inside an agent?')
sendPrompt('What tools can an AI agent use?')
sendPrompt('How does memory work in an AI agent?')

svg.text: Observations feed back into the loop.
Runs until the goal is complete.
